Page.Width: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualWidth, FallbackValue=700}
Page.Height: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualHeight, FallbackValue=700}

Run.Text: As aircraft return to base, they are automatically refuelled and rearmed. This process takes time, often up to 30 minutes, so planning and coordinating strikes is very important.
Different aircraft loadouts may entail different reload times. This will be indicated by a reload timer in parentheses for each loadout shown before launch.
